full_text:
Ju Gu 沮鵠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ju Gu (沮鵠)was born in Julu. Maintained Handan. Defeated by Zhang Liao and shot while fleeing. Ju Gu was affiliated with Yuan Shao and Yuan Shang. Ju Gu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
Ordered to maintain Handan as a distant auxiliary while Yuan Shang went to Pingyuan. Cao Cao advanced to Handan where Ju Gu came out to fight but was defeated in three bouts by Zhang Liao. Ju Gu fled but Zhang Liao pursued, killing the Yuan general with a bowshot.
